summary: Phase 1: Add chunk_embeddings table and backfill from ChromaDB

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Current SQLite schema (scripts/schema.sql) uses a UNIFIED nodes table: nodes(id, type IN ('tradition','concept','chunk'), tradition_id, label, definition, metadata_json) + edges(source_id, target_id, type, tier, justification). There are NO separate chunks/texts/traditions/concepts tables — docs/v2.md Section 3.1/5 assumes a split schema that does not exist. Chunk bodies live in corpus/**/chunks/*.toml, not in SQLite.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: For Phase 1 scope: create chunk_embeddings with FK REFERENCES nodes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE (not chunks(id)). Downstream impact for Phase 6 export.py is larger — its SELECT * FROM chunks/texts/traditions/concepts queries must be rewritten against nodes+edges, or a view layer introduced. Flagging here so Phase 6 tickets get updated before implementation.
